epics.name: Core API
epics.desc: The public HTTP API and its data layer.

epics.name: Release & deploy
epics.desc: All work that ships to production. Gated track — never blocks a dev ticket.

tickets.name: Health-check endpoint
tickets.desc: Add GET /healthz returning 200 with build info. AC: returns version + commit; covered by a test.

tickets.name: Rate limit the public API
tickets.desc: Token-bucket limiter on unauthenticated routes, configurable per-route. AC: 429 with Retry-After when exceeded; limits covered by tests.

tickets.name: Dashboard empty state
tickets.desc: Design and build the first-run empty state for the dashboard. AC: matches the design system; no console errors; responsive.

tickets.name: Migrate sessions table to partitioned schema
tickets.desc: High-blast-radius data migration. AC: reversible migration; row counts + checksums verified on a throwaway DB before landing; zero data loss.

tickets.name: Production cutover
tickets.desc: Cut the new release over to production. Gated — requires explicit human go-ahead and a maintenance window.
